description: Unique identifier for each order in the Olist dataset.
Customer identifier assigned by Olist; a single customer may have multiple orders.
Timestamp when the order was placed.
Line item number inside the order; orders may contain multiple items.
Unique identifier for the ordered product.
Sale price paid for the order item.
Customer postal code prefix (Brazilian ZIP prefix).
Customer city name from the customer record.
Two-letter Brazilian state code for the customer (e.g. SP for São Paulo).
Binary indicator derived during preparation; reflects whether the customer is classified as frequent/repeat.
Binary indicator derived during preparation; reflects whether the product is classified as a frequent purchase.
